definition.name: eps-cstar-algebra
definition.definition: def-eps-cstar-algebra (definitions/def-eps-cstar-algebra.md). An eps-C* algebra is a complex Banach space with bilinear product, conjugate-linear involution X|->X^dag, and unit I, satisfying: (ax_prodnorm) ||XY||<=(1+eps)||X||||Y||; (ax_assoc) ||(XY)Z-X(YZ)||<=eps||X||||Y||||Z|| (eps-associativity); (ax_*) ||X^dag||=||X|| and (XY)^dag=Y^dag X^dag (exact involution); (ax_C*) ||X^dag X||>=(1-eps)||X||^2; with exact unit XI=X=IX, ||I||=1, I^dag=I. An EXTENDED eps-C* algebra is a self-adjoint operator space making each M_n tensor A an eps-C* algebra. KEY: ax_C* is only a NORM lower bound, NOT an order inequality X^dag X >= -eps||X||^2 I.
